programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Snitch (2013)
programme.desc: A father (Dwayne Johnson) goes undercover for the DEA in order to free his son who was imprisoned after being set up in a drug deal.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A blind girl receives a cornea transplant so that she is able to see again. However, she gets more than she bargains for when she realizes she can see disturbing ghosts.

programme.title: You Stupid Man
programme.desc: A writer struggles to deal with the break-up with his girlfriend. It does not help with getting her out of his mind that she recently became a famous TV start.

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Let Go
programme.desc: Featuring the king of comedy Kevin Hart, this hilarious, unconventional and heartfelt journey is all about love, loss and other felonies! Discontent parole officer Walter is struggling with the humdrums of married life.

programme.title: Bowery at Midnight
programme.desc: Kindly soup kitchen operator and professor of criminology, Karl Wagner, uses his soup kitchen as a front for a criminal gang. When things get out of hand, Wagner kills his henchmen, who wind up as zombies in the cellar of the soup kitchen.

programme.title: Spaced Out
programme.desc: When three voluptuous female aliens crash-land in an English park, the result is close encounters of the sauciest kind! Three hapless men witness the UFO's arrival and are kidnapped by the sexy extra-terrestrials who discover the joys of first contact!

programme.title: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair
programme.desc: Twin British sex-bombs Mary Millington and Rosemary England take on an astrologer who can bed women as easily as he can read fortunes! No-one goes home a Virgo - and Diana Dors adds to the glam!

programme.title: Angel And The Badman
programme.desc: Quirt Evans, an all round bad guy, is nursed back to health and sought after by Penelope Worth, a Quaker girl. He eventually finds himself having to choose between his world and the world Penelope lives in. Starring: John Wayne, Gail Russell, Harry Carey

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger investigates a series of unexplained deaths in a town called Helena.

programme.title: Wrangler: Wrangler
programme.desc: Ben is intent on building a life with Alice although he faces some competition from local cowboy Jack. When Alice's father dies, and a creditor plots to seize her land, Ben leaps to her defense - an act that could lead to their marriage or his funeral.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: WARRIOR tells the moving and inspirational story of the Conlon family, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) and Paddy (Nick Nolte), who find redemption in the ring as they fight to repair themselves and their family.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: An ex-CIA agent and his estranged daughter are forced on the run when his employers erase all records of his existence, and mark them both for termination as part of a wide-reaching international conspiracy.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Ex-soldier Joseph Smith comes home from war but has been left disturbed by his experiences. Despite his intentions to start a new life, he becomes caught up in the criminal underworld, where he plots revenge on his friend's killer.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: 10 Minutes Gone
programme.desc: Action legends Bruce Willis (Die Hard) and Michael Chiklis ("The Shield") light up this edge-of-your seat thriller.

programme.title: Copycat
programme.desc: Holly Hunter is an ambitious cop who tries to draw the forensic psychologist out of her self-imposed exile to help catch a murderer who is copying work of other serial killers.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Contamination
programme.desc: A deserted ship arrives in New York City carrying its slaughtered crew and a horrific cargo: Mutant green eggs the size of footballs that pulsate with life until they spray hideous chest-bursting death.

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: Following ecological disaster, a family from Earth do what they must to survive on a desolate Mars homestead.

programme.title: Cadia: The World Within
programme.desc: Devastated by the loss of their mother, three teens discover a mystical realm ruled by unseen forces and must overcome evil in the order to return home.

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: Experience the magical world of 'The Secret Garden' as never before in this beautiful production of the classic tale. When her parents are lost in a tragic accident, Mary must seek comfort in the strange and forgotten corridors of Misselthwaite Factory.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Ireland
programme.desc: In this episode, Craig and Sarah take a closer look at a case that took place in November 2018 off the west coast of Ireland in which pilots saw bizarre lights through their cockpit windows. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Rendlesham
programme.desc: Over the past 50 years a fascinating pattern has emerged, linking UFOs with military personnel and installations. One of the most significant of these events took place on British soil in 1980. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Buried Secrets Of Mount Cook
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Siberia's Frozen Necropolis
programme.desc: Researchers find a mummy buried in a strange way. A legendary polar exploration vehicle goes missing in Antarctica. A glacier cave on Mt. St. Helens is explored. An island in the Bering Sea may contain clues to the extinction of the woolly mammoth.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Russia's Mountain Mummy Enigma
programme.desc: Russian soldiers make a grim discovery on a mountain. An abandoned town has an unusual past. Scientists working in Antarctica find something surprising beneath the ice. In Greenland, strange depressions in the ground are investigated.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Riddle Of Whale Bone Alley
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: After Sara is abducted by the 'Miniature Killer', the CSIs must search the desert for her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs work with the FBI to investigate the murders of a young boy and a woman.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team is joined by a new CSI, Michael Keppler, who assists them on a case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine reluctantly agrees to help Keppler deceive the team in order to catch a murderer

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick and Keppler investigate when a charred body is discovered with organs removed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick and Keppler investigate when a charred body is discovered with organs removed.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Scorpion: Queen Scary
programme.desc: At Halloween, Team Scorpion takes on a case to prove the existence of ghosts on the Queen Mary but find an all-too-real disaster when they locate a 'ghost ship' on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: Scorpion: Go With the Florence
programme.desc: While tracking a device that can prevent a nuclear meltdown through the Los Angeles sewers, Walter learns the nuances of listening and not offering advice to Paige.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faire is Foul
programme.desc: For Sylvester's birthday, Team Scorpion visits a renaissance festival, but the revelry is cut short when a group tries to rob a nearby police evidence locker.

programme.title: Scorpion: It's Raining Men (Of War)
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence \, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: Andy McNally’s first shift on the job turns into mayhem when shots are fired in a downtown rooming house. In the midst of the chaos, Andy triumphantly makes her first big arrest

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: Blamed for the murder of his girlfriend, a man (Daniel Radcliffe) awakes one morning to find he has grown a pair of horns. Armed, now, with supernatural powers, he sets out to find the killer.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The fate of the human race hangs in the balance when the Witch Queen (Julie Engelbrecht) rises from the dead, seeking revenge against Kaulder (Vin Diesel), the immortal warrior who slayed her centuries ago.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, is in mourning for his dead father, the king. He's also disturbed by how quickly his mother, Gertrude, has remarried.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: The ill-fated romance of Horatio Lord Nelson and Emma Hamilton, wife of the British Ambassador to Naples. Made during WWII, the film was clearly meant to raise the morale of British audiences and was said to have been Churchill's favourite film.

programme.title: Secret People
programme.desc: Maria meets an old love, Louis, who has become a radical and currently plots to assassinate a world leader. Louis uses Maria to enter London and then convinces her to begrudgingly join their terrorist group.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A shooter inside a historic arena leaves Sam questioning his place on the team.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU team attempts to rescue a carjacked baby and a young man held hostage.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A woman kidnaps two young girls while the SRU's question how the kidnappings are related.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Two brothers get caught up in a white supremacy group that is planning a terrorist attack.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A high school athlete threatens suicide after he is kidnapped and beaten.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: An armed and dangerous man accused of killing his baby escapes and is on the run.

programme.title: The Hunchback of Notre Dame
programme.desc: Based on the novel, a young gypsy becomes a Minister's obsession in 1483. Only the bell ringer and her husband and the court of miracles can save her.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Last Chance Café
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town.

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: The Gate (1987)
programme.desc: The removal of an old tree in Glen's backyard reveals a large and mysterious hole which leads to The Gate – an underground chamber of terrifying demonic evil.

programme.title: Shivers
programme.desc: The residents of a suburban high-rise apartment building are being infected by a strain of parasites that turn them into mindless, sex-crazed fiends out to infect others by the slightest sexual contact.

programme.title: Pluto TV 80’s Horror
programme.desc: Slashers, synths, and supernatural scares—Pluto TV 80’s Horror brings you the blood-soaked glory days of fright. From cult classics to VHS gems, relive the decade that made horror iconic. Big hair, bigger screams!

programme.title: Pieces

programme.desc: Money is a strong motivator. It can be used for good. It can be used for evil. It can be the driving force behind murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: This episode transports us into the teenage territory of Indiana pack leader Melinda Loveless, whose jealousy sparks a rampage that leads to the kidnap and torture of a 12-year-old.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
programme.desc: Russell wants to put his family back together after his three children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year-old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiancé Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Ex-Lovers Confronted
programme.desc: Today on Jerry Springer, did Chris and Shawn move to escape his ex Joy or to hide his extracurriculars with her? Next Jerome explains why his wife causes him to cheat!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Shocking Secret Lovers
programme.desc: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next, Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a shocking person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Let Me At Her!
programme.desc: It’s the battle of the exes! Tony fights to get her ex-lover back. Richard reveals to his wife that he’s had an affair, and watches as Lisa, his ex-lover, fights to get him back!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I've Had Enough It's Over!
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating Chango for six years! Next Mark's ex wants him back and even lied about a pregnancy. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Exhumed Client
programme.desc: Sir Charles Farnsworth is found dead in his mysterious Farnsworth Castle. It turns out that Farnsworth had a clause inserted in this will that his death, no matter what the apparent cause, would be investigated by Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Dr. Watson and the inspector are led to a little shop when Holmes goes missing.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a missing boy that vanishes on a train after he and his father have a fight.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes uncovers a serious mystery when helping one of Watson's old friends.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to the Sussex countryside to 'fish' for clues in a shotgun murder.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death
programme.desc: During WWII, several murders occur at a convalescent home where Dr. Watson has volunteered his services. Holmes is summoned to solve the crime from a long list of suspects including the owners, staff, and the patients.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson treat an injured man after a fierce encounter that he barely escapes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Collective Justice
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Trust
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Predators And Parasites
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay tests the contestants' ability to communicate and work together with a three entrée relay race, with the winners getting a helicopter tour and a caviar tasting.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon reunites the contenders with their loved ones before challenging them to jazz up some basic cuts of meat.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A team of previous winners returns to challenge the remaining contestants; each team designs its own menus for dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final five chefs must impress tough critics with a gourmet burger; a huge misstep brings dinner service to a halt; one chef is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With the grand finale just around the corner, the remaining chefs are challenged to replicate a sample dish using taste, texture and sight alone. The winner is rewarded with a $1,000 shopping spree before another taxing evening service begins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay presides over the penultimate episode of the US cooking competition as this year's explosive series nears its climax. Three contestants soon become two as Gordon names the second finalist.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing
programme.desc: We investigate the story of David and Catherine Birnie, Australia's most sadistic husband and wife killing team, who tortured, raped and murdered four women in 1986.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Headless Body: The Kim Barry Murder
programme.desc: In 1981, the headless and fingerless body of 19-year-old Kim Narelle Barry was found dumped in the bush at a mountain lookout near Wollongong, south of Sydney.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Killing Fields of Truro
programme.desc: For the 2008 launch of Crime Investigation Australia, CI presents the complete and compelling story of "The Killing Fields of Truro", one of the most infamous crimes in Australia and yet another set in Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Kid for Ransom / Tears for Daniel
programme.desc: We examine two notorious abduction cases. The first case is the Graeme Thorne ransom kidnapping at Bondi in 1960. Thorne, aged eight, was the son of winners of the Sydney Opera House Lottery.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Body in the Sports Bag
programme.desc: A young Sydney man was found guilty of strangling his ex-girlfriend and stuffing the teenager's body in a cricket bag.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: Round the Clock
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Mess with Texas
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Frankie'd Up Beyond All Recognition
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home. Back in LA, Frankie's wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking...

programme.title: Operation Repo: Monumental Changes
programme.desc: Matt and Froy set out to repo a truck from a wealthy Texan, but their mission backfires when the Sheriff arrives with a new arrest warrant that will send Froy away for good.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Adapt, Improvise, and Overcome
programme.desc: Lou takes his new guys on their very first repo but, when the debtors attack with chainsaws, Ronnie and Carlos are left to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Deep Dish Disaster
programme.desc: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult, but everything goes awry when the new guys aren't prepared and Matt is left picking up the pieces.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Traffic Jammin'
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah confront a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Repo Arigato, Mr. Roboto
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah confront a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: A Little Change Never Hurt Anybody
programme.desc: Nikki’s in love – but not with the Professor!

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: At Last
programme.desc: Nikki’s wedding has a shocking effect on Oglevee.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Scammed Straight
programme.desc: Cash-strapped college students Nikki and Kim Parker become a mother-daughter telephone psychic team.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: The Wild Card
programme.desc: When Andi blends her work life with her personal life, it opens up a world of unforeseen issues. (S3, ep19)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: We Got Time
programme.desc: An eye-opening conversation with Calvin causes Danni to view relationships differently, including her own. (S3, ep20)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Curve Balls
programme.desc: Life altering revelations claim a former couple's infidelity. (S3, ep21)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: A Woman's Work
programme.desc: Fatima devises a plan to put a stop to Hayden's games once and for all. (S3, ep22)

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby
programme.desc: Wicked star Eden Espinosa’s Yorkshire Terrier, Owen, is creating drama. The Redemptorist brothers at Holy Redeemer College in Washington, D.C. needed a guard dog. Rocky, a rescue, can’t stop crying.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Battle of Britain
programme.desc: As Cesar's UK holiday comes to a close, he meets a snappy klee kai, a collie mix that's afraid of loud noises and an over-energetic Labrador.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Optimus & Gigi and Sissy
programme.desc: Cesar lends his hand reforming Great Dane Optimus, who has a biting attitude, and Sissy, a fearful Shepherd mix rescued from a terrible hoarding situation.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maya, Sara, and Lilly
programme.desc: Maya, an adopted Border Collie/Spring Spaniel Mix loves to jump but is hurting her owner’s neck. Next we meet Sara, an overly-aggressive Shepherd mix and Lilly, a pushy Poodle.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Avenger
programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Will
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Treasure
programme.desc: Krystle begins working with Daniel. Blake is adamantly opposed and exchanges harsh words with Reece. Dex is furious with Alexis for traveling to Sumatra to see Blake's father. Alexis learns from Amanda of Dex's experience with Daniel in Vietnam.

programme.title: Dynasty: Foreign Relations
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty: Triangles
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.256
programme.desc: A young woman sues ex-business partner for investment return and legal fees. Another sues ex-friend for VW Jetta balance, disputing key handover. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for utility bills, deposit, and debt.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.247
programme.desc: Alleged abuse of a seven-year-old boy, unpaid loans, and shared living expenses are disputed by ex-lovers. A loan to buy work clothes, a broken lease, and unpaid child support come into play when former lovers fight over money.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.92
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute loan for motorcycle repair trade school, laptop cost, and apartment repairs. Man sues friend for car damage; she admits drinking and letting someone else drive it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.110
programme.desc: Custody of a beautiful, homemade baptismal gown is disputed by entranged family members/While driving with her five children in the car, a woman runs a red light, is arrested and is later sued by her uncle who claims he bailed her out.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.62
programme.desc: Man allegedly smashes ex-girlfriend's stereo in jealous rage; she accused of throwing his leather jacket in rain. Fight continues over parking fines. House sitter accused of trashing friend's apartment, damaging car while out of town.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.185
programme.desc: A woman’s life-long dream to have plastic surgery is fulfilled by her ex-fiancé who demands that he be paid back; a Christmas day fight over child custody further escalates their fight.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.229
programme.desc: A woman denies filing a retaliatory restraining order after finding her ex-fiancé with someone else; accused of kicking his bedroom door. Another woman sued for passing fraudulent check in secret-shopper scam.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.140
programme.desc: Older couple accuses daughter and stepson-in-law of abuse including unpaid loans and theft; young couple denies. Man denies responsibility for drunk driving accident, claims friend knew he was intoxicated.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.257
programme.desc: Road rage after an argument over a man leaves former friends fighting over damages from a car accident. A personal assistant is accused of violent behavior after her decision to quit her job and sue her former employer.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.199
programme.desc: A teen DD falls asleep at the wheel, totaling a car after giving drunk minors a ride. Co-workers moving in together face bed mix-ups, pet issues, and a broken lease.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.250
programme.desc: A teenager's friend faces accusations of drinking, driving, and crashing a stolen golf cart; he blames the teenager's mother for providing alcohol. Two brothers fight over damages to a home allegedly caused by domestic violence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Driven to Extremes
programme.desc: Mary Hill was driving three teens, when her BMW crashed and killed two of them. Hill claims she lost control as the car sped up on its own, but investigators say she was driving recklessly. Hill was charged with vehicular homicide and manslaughter.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed the Prosecutor?
programme.desc: Steve Tauzer, a prominent assistant district attorney in Kern County, CA, was found murdered in his garage. Chris Hillis, a former police officer, a colleague and friend of Tauzer, was arrested for the murder. Chris’ son Lance was key to the case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Sugar Land Conspiracy
programme.desc: In December 2003, the Whitaker family-- Kent, his wife Tricia, and their sons, Bart and Kevin-- returned home from dinner. Upon entering the house, Kevin and Tricia were fatally shot. The investigation revealed that the murders had been planned by Bart.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mystery in Room 813
programme.desc: On November 13, 1996, at a Sheraton hotel east of Los Angeles, 27-year-old Sandra Orellana of Houston, on a business trip with her 33-year-old boss Robert Salazar, went over a balcony and met her death.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Soldier's Wife
programme.desc: A soldier claims the fatal shot he fired into the back of his young wife's head was an accident, but prosecutors say he did it intentionally in a fit of jealousy.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: A report on the 26-year effort of Bruce Lisker to overturn his conviction for the murder of his mother. In March 1983, 17-year-old Bruce Lisker called 911 to tell police that he had found his mother, Dorka Lisker, beaten severely and stabbed in her home.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blast
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Ghost Story
programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Party
programme.desc: The whereabouts of a list of enemy agents operating in the United States are locked in the memory of a captured spy, Col. Vanin (guest star Frank Marth), and no one, including the spy, can penetrate his mind in "The Party"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blind
programme.desc: An F.B.I. man is blinded while investigating a crime syndicate attempting to take over a large chemical plant. Jim Phelps undergoes a delicate eye operation so as to appear convincingly blind when he poses as the sightless man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encore
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Party Gras
programme.desc: On a trip to New Orleans, Ton and Allen look to mix business with pleasure. They wage war with some locals at a tough auction, win a Mardi Gras unit that contains a confetti blaster and a modern calliope, then hit the town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-ed Killer: The Murder Capital of the World (Part 1)
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil’s Work (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Charles Manson story is told via Manson Family members, victims’ families, witnesses, prosecutors, reporters, authors, and Manson in his own words detailing the horror of the vicious attacks.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil’s Work (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Charles Manson story is told via Manson Family members, victims’ families, witnesses, prosecutors, reporters, authors, and Manson in his own words detailing the horror of the vicious attacks.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detective Keogh and SIO Terry Crompton discuss the 2016 murder of Yang Liu, whose torso was found in a suitcase.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: A drug gang stabbing is discussed by Steve Keogh and Paul Withers. Forensic and drug experts reveal the clues as Jackie Keen pays tribute to her son.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: An elderly man is murdered and burned by burglars. Detective Keogh discusses the case. Fire and forensic experts explain how the case was solved.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Killer Evidence
programme.desc: A drug dealer has been shot dead in Southampton, UK. With very little forensic evidence to go on, police must rely on the description of a witness who got away.

programme.title: Britain's Countryside Killers
programme.desc: In Lancashire, UK, teenager Alex was murdered by Brian Healless, whom he met on a dating app. Healless, who was suffering from untreated paranoid schizophrenia, was jailed for life.

programme.title: Britain's Countryside Killers
programme.desc: In April 2022, 33-year-old Katie Kenyon vanished from her home in Padiham, Lancashire, UK. A chilling investigation revealed her manipulative ex-boyfriend, Andrew Burfield, 50, had trapped her in a cycle of fear.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Yosemite Park Murderer
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day weekend 1999, three tourists from Yosemite National Park disappeared and were found murdered a month later.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: A common-law couple was found guilty of the 1990 rape and murder of Taunja Bennett near Portland, Oregon.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder: Murder In The Desert
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved yoga instructor appears to be an open and shut robbery homicide until detectives find themselves deep in a murder investigation with one too many twists.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder: Monday Night Murder
programme.desc: When a man's family and coworkers lose touch with him for days, the police are sent to his apartment. But what they find is far worse than any of them expected.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder: Cross Country Killer
programme.desc: When police find a young college student murdered in Mission Viejo, they have no idea that it is just the start off a cross country killing spree.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder: House Of Lies
programme.desc: A wife calls 911 to report a burglary and her husband being shot, but the evidence around the house starts to tell a story of its own.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The small but mighty Storm II takes on Mayhem, Rhino and Supernova in round one, as Mayhem fights its first battle. Team Steel Avenger named the heat, the Heat of Doom as it includes Supernova, Shredder Evolution and Storm II.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Thermidor 2 and Kronic the Wedgehog meet again in a replay of another heat. Thermidor 2 puts up an impressive fight as it takes down every robot in its path.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Iceland is a land born out of fire, sculpted by ice. This unique island is home to some of the planet's rarest and most spectacular creatures and it harbors some of the most extreme environments on Earth.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The RAF’s maritime role is often overlooked. Between the wars the RAF operated elegant flying boats to patrol the far flung corners of the Empire.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: After the war, RAF transports helped keep Berliners alive during the Soviet blockade of the city in 1948/49. As well as flying round-the-clock operations into the airport, Sunderland flying boats delivered supplies by landing on Lake Havel near the city.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: A look at the women surrounding Hitler once he came to power, and how they were held up as the Aryan Ideal to strive for once the Nazi dictator approved of their positions.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: How women were active - and often violent participants and perpetrators - in the conflict and its attendant atrocities - especially the Holocaust.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: Focusing on the fanatical women who took Hitler under their wing and, through love and devotion, acclimatised him to high society to launch him to power, only to be left behind once he achieved it.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: Cataloguing the many lovers of the Nazi dictator, and charting the unfortunate demise of all who dared resist his love, affection and sexual appetite.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget's Roma
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. When Quimby learns Thelma is being sent back to ancient Rome to learn the Secret of Roma inscribed on a mosaic at the Forum he sends GADGET to stop her in the time machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Curse Of The Pharaoh (Poot-Ta-Foot'S Curse)

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Invasion

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Bad Dreams Are Made Of This

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Crashcourse In Crime

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East London
programme.desc: From a design duo looking for their next project to a couple who are finally ready to put down roots and buy a home together this search takes Phil and Kirstie to South East London and on a journey like no other!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Merseyside
programme.desc: Gary Wakefield and wife Nicky don't try to disguise themselves-they admit they are the fussiest house-hunters in the country.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit 1: Sutton Coldfield/Norwich
programme.desc: In this episode, Kirstie and Phil are catching up with two couples who gave them two tough challenges in two fast moving property markets – Sutton Coldfield in Birmingham and Norwich.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Surrey
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey - and at opposite ends of the property ladder.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Riverside
programme.desc: London is one of the most expensive and competitive cities to buy property in the world so they're going to have to pull out all the stops if they're going to make these property dreams a reality.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Maidenhead, Derbyshire Revisits
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are back to catch up with two sets of house hunters at opposite ends of the age spectrum.

programme.title: CBS News Latest Headlines

programme.title: CBS News Latest Headlines
programme.desc: The latest headlines and top stories from CBS News.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: CBS Evening News Plus

programme.title: Arthur: Francine Redecorates/Arthur The Loser
programme.desc: Francine and Catherine are very different, but it’s no fun if you're two sisters sharing the same room. Then, there's only one thing in life Arthur really wants—to win! But he just can't stop losing. Is it really so wrong to cheat a little?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry
programme.desc: D.W. is panicked when a virus ruins the Read family computer. Who will take care of her virtual pet? Arthur and D.W. are thrilled when Grandma Thora lets them turn her attic into a clubhouse. But will a bat threaten their new play space?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.

programme.title: Arthur: Citizen Frensky/D.W.'S Backpack Mishap
programme.desc: After visiting The Elwood City Times, Francine decides to start her own paper--The Frensky Star! The tabloid is a success--until all her friends stop speaking to her. Somebody stole D.W.'s backpack!! Who is this fluffy unicorn thief?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: Arthur: So Long, Spanky/Buster's New Friend
programme.desc: D.W.'s beloved bird gets very sick, and despite D.W.'s eager ministrations, Spanky dies. Can she risk giving her heart to another pet? Then, Buster doesn't have time for Arthur. And all he wants to talk about is a new friend named Mike.

programme.title: Arthur: Summer Stories
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop thinks the half-moon is somehow broken, Barney and Friends take an imaginary visit to the moon where Barney eases her concerns.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Stop! Go!
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big Brother Rusty
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Strongarm takes on her first “solo” mission—tracking the insane frog-like Decepticon SPRINGLOAD to the ruins of an ancient temple.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Adventures in Bumblebee-sitting!
programme.desc: The Bee Team welcomes visiting Autobot veteran JAZZ, just in time to fend off the massive Bot-worm PED – a petty crook bent on monopolizing Energon supplies.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Infected by a Decepticon’s toxin, Bumblebee regresses to the maturity of a youngster, leaving the team essentially leaderless, chasing an escaped fugitive, and trying to keep tabs on the hyperactive lieutenant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Out of Focus
programme.desc: The Bee team finds itself caught in the middle of a feud between rival bounty hunters, who are both out to claim a bounty on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sideways
programme.desc: Bee tries to keep his team from distraction as they fight MALODOR and his Skunkticon posse, while Optimus, in the realm of the Primes, undergoes a dangerous test administered by MICRONUS.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Even Robots Have Nightmares
programme.desc: Sideswipe blackmails Strongarm into doing all his work while the team tries to capture crab-like CLAMPDOWN, jailed for the very same crime back on Cybertron, before he can join Steeljaw’s Pack.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Some Body, Any Body
programme.desc: Denny and the Bots are captured by the bat-Decepticon NIGHTSTRIKE, who plunges the team members into their worst fears.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing
programme.desc: Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot’s head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he’s unable to contribute to the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: After a dispute with his sensei, Drift, Jetstorm returns to Earth in the hopes of studying at the feet of a new master – Russell!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Champ
programme.desc: Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.desc: When eccentric zillionaire A.J. Howard hires Dirk Savage, a professional mercenary, to rid the city of its 'mutant problem', the first mutants he goes after are the Turtles!

programme.desc: Royal Bee, Neonlicious, and Lady Diva try their best to convince Swag she belongs at the Queen's Gala, but it's not working. If Swag skips out, it is ucnlear who will perform `Party All 'Round the World'.

programme.title: LOL House of Surprises
programme.desc: Lady Diva has a big surprise planned for her little sister's birthday and the crew's pulling out all the stops. She invited none other than Lil' Diva's favorite queen, Splash Beauty, to come perform at the House of Surprises.

programme.title: LOL House of Surprises
programme.desc: When Royal Bee, Swag, Neonlicious, and Lady Diva find out Candylicious was not able to go to the Queen's Gala, they bring the Gala-to-Go with Runway Diva, Prism, Sways, and Miss Divine to the House of Surprises.

programme.title: LOL House of Surprises
programme.desc: Royal Bee invites Grand Queen, Charm Queen, Study Queen and Mystery Queen to tour the House of Surprises, but Queen Bee thinks this means they are all house-sitting-in for her big sister, so Royal Bee can leave for a new job.

programme.title: LOL House of Surprises
programme.desc: Goldie Twist and Gracie Skates make a plan to clean up the beach and host a clothing swap as a way to do some good for the planet, but things don't go as planned, so they finally have to ask for help from Royal Bee, Neonlicious, Swag and Lady Diva.

programme.title: Kung Fu Sock
programme.desc: Tee Zeng is going to Rainbow Cat Park with her best friend, Min. Tee Zeng plans to ask Min to join them in finding and fighting Kwei, but Kung Fu Sock does not approve of the plan.

programme.title: Kung Fu Sock
programme.desc: Tee Zeng and Min plan to go to a seafood restaurant but can't find a coupon. Instead, they find an old fishing pole. To get some free seafood, Tee Zeng decides that they should go on a fishing trip.

programme.title: Kung Fu Sock
programme.desc: There's one thing that Tee Zeng can't live without: spicy buns from the local bun house. But the bun house is closed because their secret ingredient has gone missing. Tee Zeng decides this is a perfect opportunity for her to become a real detective.

programme.title: Kung Fu Sock
programme.desc: Min has a nice comb that's made of precious old wood, but Tee Zeng accidently breaks it in two. Kung Fu Sock tells Tee Zeng to come clean, but she worries it might hurt their friendship, so she decides to hide it from Min and make her a new comb.

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Biscuit goes to the Dino dentist for a check-up. Miguel learns to keep trying and never give up!

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Miguel builds a dam on the creek to create a dino watering hole, and the ranch is suddenly marauded by wild pterodactyls; the infamous dino rustler Sonny the Kid threatens to ruin her friends' big day, so Min volunteers to guard the Dino Airport.

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: After Jon injures himself, Min takes the lead to rescue a wild raptor; Min's excitement to deliver an egg to her friend gets the best of her.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Another heat wave, and even the riverbed is dried up. One very thirsty Grizzy discovers that the Lemmings have used the last remaining bottles of water to fill their inflatable pool.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have caught a little spider. Her sticky threads are perfect for bungee jumping. Grizzy, who has no intention of getting caught in the web, decides to crush the insect.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over chocolate-spread jar lids, which they use as chips to win goodies. But more importantly, there's a grand prize, a giant jar of Yummy.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favourite series, but his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings are having a rave party. When Grizzy throws their stereo into the river, he sparks a general power outage and is unable to watch his favourite shows.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: After making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear, Grizzy is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But Grizzy's luck is about to change.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy can't believe his eyes when he sees objects moving all by themselves. He soon realises it's the Lemmings who are playing around with a magnet.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is persuaded that the she-bear he's in love with has been turned into a frog. Whilst he looks through books of fairy tales, searching for a means to return his beloved to her original form, the Lemmings try to recover the frog.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers a baby raccoon not far from the log cabin. When he sees its big moist eyes, Grizzy melts and adopts the creature. When the Lemmings drag the baby into their dangerous games, the overprotective Grizzy steps in.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the pleasures of video games on the ranger's console. The Lemmings want to try their hand at the joystick but Grizzy refuses to interrupt his kart racing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy builds a look-alike robot to keep the Lemmings away while he prepares a party for his beloved she-bear. But his double's artificial intelligence leaves a lot to be desired.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's she-bear is convinced she's a lemming after hitting her head. Grizzy believes another well-aimed hit will correct her thinking, but the Lemmings are thrilled to have a new playmate.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Plunk, a member of the Bad Crowd comes aboard the Cloudseeker as a refugee with a secret mission to steal the map to the Cavern of Caring.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Cheer and the team risk losing their vehicle and the only way back home to save the Whiffles' newly planted valley when spores from a plant take over the Cloudseeker.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: The Bears encounter a lost Whiffle whose only word is Riffle. They have no idea who he is or where he came from. Dibble is tasked with looking out for him until they learn where he lives.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Mysterious flying hearts appear in Care-A-Lot and bring Wish Bear to the Silver Lining.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: A family of raucous rocks move into a nearby Whiffle garden and distract them with their ground-pounding games.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: When hard-working Cheer exhausts her crew running a string of drills to protect a Whiffle orchard from possible emergencies, Shareo's belly badge accidentally creates two Cheer duplicates.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: When Dibble dresses up as a superhero complete with a pretend belly badge, the Whiffles think she's the real thing and need her to confront an imaginary monster that they believe lives in a cave.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With 36 warriors left, quality is beginning to overtake quantity. Most of Universe 7's fighters remain and Universe 4's Frost is ready to pick a fight with them.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Ribrianne continue their battle, and Frieza double-crosses Gohan by teaming up with Frost to destroy the Saiyans.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Ribrianne gathers the love energy from her teammates to become a more formidable opponent for Goku. Goku switches his focus to Jiren, who intends to crush Goku by any means necessary.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: As Goku and Jiren battle for control of the spirit bomb, Goku suddenly vanishes and returns with an incredible new power.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Frieza surprises Goku with an act of generosity, Hit attempts to break his stalemate with Jiren, who seems completely unstoppable, and Vegeta fights Ribrianne.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The Saiyans of Universe 6 battle Monna from Universe 4, Vegeta and Cabba make a pact, and faced with the threat of losing, Cabba achieves a higher level of Super Saiyan.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Caulifla's power level soars and she insists upon fighting Goku to become even stronger, but Goku begins to struggle when he invites Kale to join the fight.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: After Caulifla helps Kale snap out of her berserker rage, the pair doubles down on Goku, forcing him to power up with what little energy he has left.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Caulifla and Kale fuse into the extremely powerful Kefla and continue fighting Goku. A Supreme Kai attempts to replicate their success by giving his Potara earrings to his fighters so they can fuse as well.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Kefla powers up for an attack mighty enough to potentially defeat Goku in his Ultra Instinct form as their battle comes to a fierce conclusion.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: A drained Goku winds up helpless against the second-universe team, but the androids come to his rescue. Vegeta becomes determined to achieve Ultra Instinct in his fight against Katopesla.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand – on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree and under a cloud. But each time they stand under the cloud it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po walks up to say ‘Eh-oh’, then marches off again. She joins the other Teletubbies to see two children watching a herd of elephants in a safari park.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po say's "Eh-oh" and runs off to join the other Tubbies when they watch Andy Brown and some children go on a boat trip to feed some sealions. The Tubbies are very busy at the switch panel, pressing buttons and pushing levers.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies play a round and round game. They watch some children playing stop and go. Then they play a Ready, Steady, Go game round and round Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun saying 'Boo! ' The Teletubbies watch some children riding on a bus when it gets washed. A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa. There's time for one more dance before Tubby Bye Bye.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies appear one at a time to say ‘Eh-oh’. They watch some children playing with bubbles. It’s time for Tubby Custard. The custard machine makes a funny noise, and a tubby custard bubble comes out followed by more.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy jumps indoors, the runs off to watch Annie and her dad land yachting on a beach. The Teletubbies sing 'Come Back Everything' song when a big wind blows their favourite things away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to announce the colour purple. Some children explore the colours purple. In Teletubbyland a big beautiful purple flower grows.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are very, very happy. They watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Race to the Finish
programme.desc: Mayor Bentley announces that Sunflower Valley is to stage its very first athletics tournament. A team from Sunflower Valley is to compete against a team of visiting athletes. Plus there is to be a special machine event!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Robert and Dot, Bob’s Mum and Dad are visiting the Valley. Bob shows them around, pointing out their recycling storeroom. Robert notices Bob’s old rubble chute. Bob explains that he hasn’t had much use for it out in the valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is erecting a tent to accommodate some newcomers to the valley. Mr Bentley is organising everything, but unfortunately leaves his phone with Spud who promptly declares himself ‘Mr Bentley’s Assistant’.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been asked to install a new air conditioning unit at Mr Sabatini’s restaurant. Wendy and Molly meanwhile have been asked to redecorate the library at the school.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles wants a fence built around his compost heap, as Scruffty keeps getting into it. Muck is excited at the prospect of such a mucky job. JJ sends Trix up to the farm with the materials.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is putting up some new signs in Sunflower Valley to help people find their way round the valley. Meanwhile Dizzy has been asked by Ela Stevenson if she’ll be the ‘walking bus’ and help the children get to school.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s just finished tidying his mobile home when Farmer Pickles comes and asks if he’ll help with his Sunflower Harvest. He needs a silo built in which to store the ripe sunflowers before they’re taken to the factory.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and Wendy are converting an old shop into a brand new restaurant for Mr Sabatini. Mr Sabatini asks Wendy to be the guest of honour at the grand opening. She is delighted but terrified at the prospect of giving a speech in public.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An early morning start for the sunflower valley team, as they are moving logs in preparation for a safety fence around Mr Sabatini’s windmill. Wendy’s off to the sunflower oil factory to help Marjorie with a big delivery.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is tiling a roof and calls at JJ’s yard to pick up the materials. But there is only one pallet of the requisite red tiles in stock, so JJ promises to send the remainder of the order as soon as his delivery arrives.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor asks Bob to build a Pets Corner in the local park. Farmer Pickles has picked up a selection of animals for it – including a chinchilla – and sends Travis and Spud off to deliver them to Bob. Unfortunately Bob runs out of chicken wire.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is installing an antique fireplace for Mrs Percival. He goes to JJ’s yard to collect it and finds JJ playing with his new model aeroplane. Bob then heads to Mrs Percival’s and starts to knock out the old fireplace.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is demolishing an old house, and sends the floorboards and roof tiles for recycling. As he finishes the job, he gets a call from Mr Bentley who wants him to renovate the museum’s annexe, where Mr Ellis plans to exhibit the work of local artists.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has bought a new attachment for Benny to try. It looks a bit big and heavy, but Benny is desperate to try it out so Bob promises he can as long as he’s with him to help. Bob gets an excited phone call from Sandy Beech up at the cave house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a goat run for Farmer Pickles new goat – Giddy. It’s Travis’s job to collect Giddy from Meg MacDonald the goat breeder. Spud teases Travis about being slow and Travis resolves to collect the goat very quickly.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are installing a bull-rush water recycling system to clean water from Farmer Pickles’ cottage. The clean water will be used to water Farmer Pickles new orchard. Bob explains that everything needs to be built in order – it’s a process.

programme.title: Green Builds and Recycling Centres
programme.desc: Bob’s back On Site! Join Bob as he shows you the amazing world of eco homes and recycling centres and learn how things you throw away can be used to make something new.
